posts.title: Why Most Malaysian Brands Fail at Consistency (And How to Fix It)
posts.body: Inconsistent logos, ad-hoc font choices, off-brand social posts — it's not a taste problem, it's a systems problem. Here's how we approach brand consistency as a buildable thing.

posts.title: Design Systems 101: Building UI That Scales Without Breaking
posts.body: Tokens, components, documentation — why a design system isn't a luxury and how to build a lightweight one fast.

posts.title: From Brief to Launch: How We Approach Every Brand Project
posts.body: Discovery, strategy, concepting, refinement, delivery — five stages that every project goes through, no exceptions.

posts.title: Typography in Malaysian Branding — What Actually Works
posts.body: From Malay script sensibility to global sans-serif defaults — our honest take on typeface choices for local brands trying to reach regional audiences.

posts.title: Content Strategy for Small Brands: Less is More
posts.body: Stop trying to post every day. Here's how to create a lean, high-quality content system that actually builds a brand instead of just filling a feed.

posts.title: How We Built the Forma Visual Identity from Scratch
posts.body: Brand decisions, type choices, and why we chose gold over red for the accent — a candid look at the thinking behind Forma's own identity system.

posts.title: Mobile-First Isn't Optional in Malaysia — Here's the Data
posts.body: Over 85% of Malaysian web traffic is mobile. If your site isn't designed mobile-first, you're not just losing UX points — you're losing customers.
